activities_projects.title: Democracy Performance Report
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate how effectively democracy works in a country
steps: Choose one democratic country
Research its government accountability, transparency and citizen participation
Prepare a short report evaluating the outcomes of democracy in that country
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops research and analytical skills about democratic systems
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of research and analysis (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Economic Inequality Research
activities_projects.objective: Study the impact of democracy on income inequality
steps: Collect data on income distribution in two democratic countries
Compare the share of income between rich and poor groups
Analyse whether democracy has reduced inequality
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands relationship between democracy and economic inequality
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of data and interpretation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Policy Reform Proposal
activities_projects.objective: Design policies to improve democratic governance
steps: Identify three weaknesses of democracy such as corruption or inequality
Suggest policy reforms to address these issues
Present the proposal as a poster or presentation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops problem-solving and policy thinking skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Feasibility and creativity of solutions (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Democratic Accountability Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Examine real examples of government accountability
steps: Find a recent news article about a government decision
Analyse whether citizens or media questioned the decision
Explain how democratic accountability was demonstrated
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises role of public scrutiny in democracy

activities_projects.title: Social Diversity Case Study
activities_projects.objective: Study how democracy handles social diversity
steps: Select a country with diverse ethnic or religious groups
Research how the government manages conflicts among groups
Explain whether democracy helped maintain harmony
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands conflict resolution in democratic societies

activities_projects.title: Democracy Debate Project
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate strengths and limitations of democracy
steps: Divide students into two groups
One group argues that democracy ensures development
The other group argues that democracy has limitations
Conduct a structured debate
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Improves reasoning, argumentation and critical thinking
activities_projects.evaluation: Strength of arguments and evidence (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Citizen Rights Awareness Campaign
steps: Identify important democratic rights such as voting and freedom of expression
Design posters or pamphlets explaining these rights
Present the campaign to classmates
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and clarity of message (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Transparency and RTI Study
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the importance of transparency in democracy
steps: Study the Right to Information Act
Find one case where RTI helped citizens obtain information
Write a report explaining the role of transparency

activities_projects.title: Democratic Development Survey
steps: Prepare a questionnaire with five questions about democracy
Survey at least five people
Analyse the responses and present findings
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops data collection and interpretation skills

activities_projects.title: Future of Democracy Essay Project
steps: Write an essay on the future of democracy in the world
Discuss challenges such as inequality, corruption and social conflicts
Suggest ways democracy can improve in the future
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Enhances critical thinking about democratic systems
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of ideas and logical argument (10 marks)
